summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cross-Skill Scheduler application. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend fully functional with all features working including charts, navigation, search, pagination, and export functionality.

design_issues.issue: Button text appears in uppercase ('RUN GREEDY SCHEDULER', 'NEW SCHEDULE') instead of title case

passed_tests: Schedule generation with 212 agents and 9 shifts
CSV export for all types (shiftwise, roster, gap, sla)
Home page loads with upload panel
Run Greedy Scheduler without files (uses defaults)
Summary cards display correct values (212 agents, 9 patterns, 1060 shifts, 94.8% SLA)
Tab navigation works for all 4 tabs
Shiftwise tab: Table shows 10 rows (9 shifts + TOTAL), bar chart renders
Gap Dashboard: Day selector works, area chart renders, 24-hour table
Agent Roster: 212 agents with pagination (25 per page), search by agent ID works
SLA Analysis: Daily SLA table (7 days), SLA bar chart, hourly coverage chart
Export CSV buttons work on all tabs
New Schedule button resets to upload view
All charts render properly with correct data and legends
